---
title: "Marketing Portfolio Presentation"
author: "Harrison Gan"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: simple
    css: presentation-styles.css
    transition: fade
    slide-number: true
    footer: "Harrison Gan | Marketing Portfolio"
---
## About Me

I am a Cal Poly Pomona student interested in marketing, digital promotion, customer engagement, and business analytics.

My goal is to connect creative marketing with data-driven decision-making.

---

## My Marketing Focus

::: {.fragment}
- Digital marketing
:::

::: {.fragment}
- Brand promotion
:::

::: {.fragment}
- Customer engagement
:::

::: {.fragment}
- Marketing analytics
:::

---

## Homey Design Experience

At Homey Design, I gained hands-on experience supporting marketing and sales for a furniture business.

I practiced creating product-focused promotional messages that communicate:

- Style
- Comfort
- Quality
- Customer value

---

## CEO Club Experience

Through CEO Club, I developed experience in student leadership and marketing communication.

- Student outreach
- Social media promotion
- Event communication
- Newsletter messaging
- Community engagement

---

## Google Analytics Skills

IBM 3202 helped me understand how analytics can support marketing decisions.

Key skills included:

- Acquisition analysis
- Engagement analysis
- Audience insights
- KPI tracking
- Dashboard thinking

---

## Marketing Dashboard

Dashboards help marketers understand whether their strategies are working.

Important KPIs include:

- Website visits
- Social engagement
- Leads
- Conversion rate

---

## Career Connection

Marketing is both creative and analytical.

::: {.fragment}
Creativity helps attract attention.
:::

::: {.fragment}
Analytics helps measure whether the strategy is working.
:::

::: {.fragment}
Together, they support smarter marketing decisions.
:::

---

## Thank You

Thank you for viewing my marketing portfolio.

Questions?
